bindings.name: aiphabee-worker
bindings.purpose: Public Worker entrypoint for health, future API, and future agent routes.
bindings.smoke_test: GET /health returns 200 with no market-data or MCP redistribution surface.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_RESEARCH_WORKFLOW
bindings.purpose: Future long-running research tasks and resumable jobs.
bindings.smoke_test: Create a dry-run workflow task and observe terminal state.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_EVENTS_QUEUE
bindings.purpose: Future async events for usage ledger, corrections, notifications, and audit fanout.
bindings.smoke_test: Publish and consume a synthetic event with request_id.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_MAINTENANCE_CRON
bindings.purpose: Future scheduled reconciliation, freshness checks, and housekeeping.
bindings.smoke_test: Invoke scheduled handler locally and record run status.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_RUN_COORDINATOR
bindings.purpose: Future run coordination, budget counters, and idempotency boundaries.
bindings.smoke_test: Create object instance and read/write a synthetic run state.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_ARTIFACTS
bindings.purpose: Future immutable artifacts, evidence snapshots, and generated report assets.
bindings.smoke_test: Put/get/delete a synthetic object with retention metadata.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_CONFIG
bindings.purpose: Future low-risk runtime flags, public config, and kill-switch metadata.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_AI_GATEWAY
bindings.purpose: Future model logging, cost tracking, limits, caching, and fallback routing.
bindings.smoke_test: Route a synthetic model request through the configured gateway.

bindings.name: AIPHABEE_HYPERDRIVE
bindings.purpose: Future Postgres/Supabase connection path for Worker runtime.
